div1.entryFree: Traders, persons engaged in trade or commerce: I'll view the manners of the town, peruse the t., gaze upon the buildings, Err. I, 2, 13. the embarked t. on the flood, Mids. II, 1, 127. t. riding to London with fat purses, H4A I, 2, 141. good t. in the flesh, Troil. V, 10, 46 (== dealers).
